# FOSS for Enterprise

This is the well-known discovery copy for agentic assistants.

Canonical slides: https://www.indrapatil.com/foss-for-enterprise/
Root llms.txt: https://www.indrapatil.com/foss-for-enterprise/llms.txt
Root llms-full.txt: https://www.indrapatil.com/foss-for-enterprise/llms-full.txt
Source: https://github.com/IndrajeetPatil/foss-for-enterprise/

Summary: Understanding Free and Open Source Software for enterprise: licenses, risks, and automated tools for managing open source dependencies.
